title: Invariant
description: A constraint rule that must hold for a configuration to be valid

severity.description: How severe a violation of this invariant is

expression.description: Evaluation expression in the format 'key.path operator value' (operators: ==, !=, >, <, >=, <=)

appliesTo.description: List of config types or paths this invariant applies to

autoRemediate.description: Whether violations of this invariant can be auto-repaired
